decision.chatProvider: Héctor Base through Cloudflare Workers AI and local rules

adversarialGates: Workers AI failure is visible and does not invoke OpenAI
deep deliberation uses open-model architect, adversary and judge passes
knownTradeoffs: Héctor Base is materially less capable than the advanced external model on some tasks
interactive chat has no live web search after this policy
complex requests may be slower when open-model deliberation uses several passes
the custom Qwen adapter remains untrained and is not the current chat model

rollback.strategy: revert this policy commit and restore the prior provider and planned-response implementations
